passes.result: Created light and dark SVG logo variants from the supplied reference, plus square favicon/icon assets.
Used fluid containers, single-column breakpoints, protected form fields from overflow, and collapsed navigation below tablet widths.
Generated every page from shared header and footer templates so sizing and navigation remain uniform.
Added canonical URLs, robots directives, Open Graph, Twitter cards, JSON-LD LocalBusiness/WebSite/WebPage/Service schema, sitemap, manifest, and favicon links.
No external fonts, frameworks, remote scripts, or heavy images. CSS and JavaScript are local and compact.
Local navigation, CTA links, mailto, tel, ROI calculator, audit estimator, mobile nav, and theme toggle were checked by static validation.
Copy was edited for service-business positioning, scanability, and implementation-first value without fabricated client claims.
